ddls:
CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the species */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the species (e.g., bird, mammal) */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the species */,
  "average_lifespan" INTEGER /* Average lifespan of the species */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Primary diet of the species */,
  "behavior" TEXT /* Behavioral characteristics of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the region (e.g., country, state) */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "climate_type" TEXT /* Climate type of the region */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the region */,
  "protected_area" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the region is a protected area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population trend */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "trend_value" REAL /* Trend value */,
  "se" REAL /* Standard error (SE) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the trend data was recorded */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the population trend data */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the trend value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_trends_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_trends_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "habitats" (
  "habitat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each habitat */,
  "habitat_name" TEXT /* Name of the habitat */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the habitat */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the habitat in square kilometers */,
  "climate_type" TEXT /* Climate type of the habitat */,
  "protected" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the habitat is protected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("habitat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species_habitats" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species */,
  "habitat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the habitat */,
  "prevalence" TEXT /* Prevalence of the species in the habitat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id", "habitat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental factor */,
  "factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the environmental factor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environmental factor */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the environmental factor */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the environmental factor on the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the observation */,
  "location" TEXT /* Specific location of the observation */,
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observer */,
  "number_of_individuals" INTEGER /* Number of individuals observed */,
  "behavior" TEXT /* Behavior of the species during the observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_observer_id FOREIGN KEY ("observer_id") REFERENCES observers ("observer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observers" (
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the observer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the observer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the observer */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the observer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environmental factor */,
  "impact_level" TEXT /* Level of impact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_impact_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_impact_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_impact_factor_id FOREIGN KEY ("factor_id") REFERENCES environmental_factors ("factor_id")
)
column_names: Category of the species (e.g., bird, mammal)
Location of the region (e.g., country, state)
Area of the region in square kilometers
Boolean indicating if the region is a protected area
Unique identifier for each population trend
Year the trend data was recorded
Source of the population trend data
Confidence level of the trend value
Area of the habitat in square kilometers
Boolean indicating if the habitat is protected
Prevalence of the species in the habitat
Unique identifier for each environmental factor
Impact of the environmental factor on the species
Behavior of the species during the observation
